case_title: 923 FOLSOM ACQUISITION LLC VS. LUKE WACLAWSKI ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 923 FOLSOM ACQUISITION LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WACLAWSKI, LUKE AKA KELLY LONG WACLAWSKI, TEDDY DOES 1 TO 10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 923 FOLSOM STREET, #101, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100185079)
